evals.prompt: Generate Terraform dashboards and alert rules for this Flask app. The service is at examples/python/flask-basic/
evals.expected_output: Terraform files created in .observe/terraform/, alert rules in .observe/alerts/, inventory Alerts and Dashboard sections populated
expectations: At least one .tf file is created in .observe/terraform/
Terraform files reference SignalFx or Splunk Observability provider
A dashboard resource is defined with charts for HTTP latency, error rate, or throughput
Alert rule definitions are created in .observe/alerts/
inventory.md Alerts section is populated with at least one alert entry
inventory.md Dashboard Recommendations section is updated

evals.prompt: Create monitoring configuration from the observability inventory for the kvstore service at examples/go/kvstore/
evals.expected_output: Terraform dashboards for KV store metrics, alerts for latency and error SLIs
expectations: Dashboard includes panels for KV store-specific metrics (store operations, evictions, or persist duration)
Alert rules include at least one critical and one warning severity
